C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\IntelliEditor.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\IntelliEditor.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\IntelliEditor.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\IntelliEditor.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o "C:\Users\G'mas\OneDrive\Documents\IntelliEditor\bin\IntelliEditor.exe" -Wl,--out-implib,"C:\Users\G'mas\OneDrive\Documents\IntelliEditor\bin\libIntelliEditor.dll.a" -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\IntelliEditor.dir\linkLibs.rsp
